case_title: DANA LEE CHAPMAN VS. ALICE M. SMITH

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-19-2013 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-10-2014 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "JUDGMENT DEBTOR WANTS TO PAY JUDGMENT CREDITOR ON FEBRUARY 8, 2014", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. DEFENDANT WAIVES PROOF OF SERVICE ON OEX IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, ALICE M. HEARING SET FOR APR-07-2014 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF FEB-10-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FOR MC-012 MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AFTER JUDGMENT AND DECLARATION OF ACCRUED INTEREST. SERVICE BY MAIL ON 02/11/14 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAPMAN, DANA LEE AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, ALICE M.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -$0- SERVED APR-08-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, ALICE M.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-08-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-08-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL.APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED TODAY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, ALICE M. HEARING SET FOR DEC-19-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CHAPMAN, DANA LEE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAPMAN, DANA LEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, ALICE M. $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
